name: StackAdapt
description: StackAdapt is an AI-powered programmatic advertising platform with REST and GraphQL APIs for managing campaigns, ad groups, creatives, targeting segments, pixel tracking, and performance reporting across native, display, video, connected TV, audio, and digital out-of-home channels.

offers.name: StackAdapt REST API
offers.description: Read-only REST API for fetching reporting data across dimensions and metrics to analyze campaign performance.

offers.name: StackAdapt GraphQL API
offers.description: Full-featured GraphQL API for creating and managing programmatic advertising campaigns, ad groups, creatives, targeting segments, pixel tracking, and performance reporting.

offers.name: StackAdapt Pixel API
offers.description: Server-to-server API for conversion tracking and audience generation without requiring website pixel installation.

offers.name: StackAdapt Data Taxonomy API
offers.description: API for secure data sharing and audience synchronization with third-party platforms and data partners.

offers.name: StackAdapt MCP Server
offers.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI agents to interact with the StackAdapt platform programmatically via the GraphQL API.
